title: lindernia verbenifolia
intro: Lindernia verbenifolia, also known as False Verbena, is a plant species belonging to the Linderniaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The plant's medicinal properties include its use in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lindernia verbenifolia include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
